summary: Comprehensive testing completed for iteration 6 features: 1) Rent month (Huurmaand) display on Tenant Management page, 2) Text-based stamp configurator replacing image-based signature upload. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/company/settings returns stamp text fields (stamp_company_name, stamp_address, stamp_phone, stamp_whatsapp)
2. PUT /api/company/settings saves stamp text fields correctly
3. PUT /api/company/settings allows partial updates of stamp fields
4. PUT /api/company/settings allows empty stamp fields
5. GET /api/kiosk/{company_id}/company/stamp returns stamp data for kiosk (no auth required)
6. GET /api/kiosk/invalid_company/company/stamp returns 404
7. POST /api/company/signature returns 404 (old endpoint removed)
8. GET /api/company/signature/image returns 404 (old endpoint removed)
9. DELETE /api/company/signature returns 404 (old endpoint removed)
10. GET /api/tenants returns tenant data with required fields
11. GET /api/payments returns payments list
12. Frontend: Tenant Management page shows 'Huurmaand: maart 2026' label at top
13. Frontend: Each tenant card shows 'Maand' column with current month (mrt 2026)
14. Frontend: Company Settings page has 4 stamp text input fields (Bedrijfsnaam, Adres, Telefoon, WhatsApp)
15. Frontend: Live stamp preview renders with house icon + text as you type
16. Frontend: Stamp preview shows dark red (#8B1A1A) border with house icon on left, text on right
17. Frontend: Save stamp button works with toast confirmation 'Instellingen opgeslagen'
18. Frontend: Payment History kwitantie dialog shows stamp with house icon and company text
19. Frontend: Kiosk page loads correctly at /kiosk/comp_demo
20. API: Kiosk stamp endpoint returns saved stamp data
seed_data_creation: Stamp data saved during testing: Stichting : Perraysarbha, Kewalbasingweg .nr.7, Tel: 8624141, WhatsApp: 0620540162
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features fully tested: 1) Rent month display on Huurders page - shows 'Huurmaand: [month year]' at top and 'Maand' column per tenant card, 2) Text-based stamp configurator - 4 input fields (bedrijfsnaam, adres, telefoon, whatsapp) with live preview showing dark red house icon + text. Old signature upload endpoints removed (404). Stamp data persists and shows on kwitanties in both admin and kiosk. Tuya Breaker Panel remains MOCKED (UI-only).

mocked_apis.Tuya Breaker Panel: UI-only mock - no real Tuya integration
